name: Google Scholar MCP Server
what_it_does: Google Scholar MCP server enabling AI agents to search academic literature — querying Google Scholar for research papers, retrieving citation counts and author profiles, searching by keyword or author, and integrating scholarly search into agent-driven academic research, literature review, and citation analysis workflows.
use_cases: Searching academic papers by keyword from literature review agents
Retrieving citation counts and paper metadata from research analysis agents
Finding author profiles and publication lists from academic profiling agents
Discovering related papers and citing works from research assistant agents
Building bibliographies and reference lists from writing assistant agents
Monitoring paper citation trends from academic monitoring agents
not_for: Real-time news or web search (use Serper or Brave Search MCPs)
Full-text paper access (Google Scholar only provides metadata/snippets)
best_when: An agent needs to search academic literature on Google Scholar — for literature reviews, citation analysis, finding research papers by topic or author.
avoid_when: You need full paper text access, real-time information, or are making high-frequency requests — Scholar rate-limits unofficial scrapers.

auth.notes: No authentication required — scrapes Google Scholar using scholarly Python library. No API key needed. Subject to Google Scholar's anti-scraping measures and rate limits.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — uses scholarly library to scrape Google Scholar
pricing.paid_tiers: None (scholarly and Google Scholar are both free)
pricing.notes: Completely free. Uses the scholarly Python library which scrapes Google Scholar. No official Google API used — subject to rate limiting and potential blocking.

performance.rate_limits: Google Scholar aggressively rate-limits scraping; may require CAPTCHA solving or proxies under heavy use

known_agent_gotchas: Google Scholar blocks automated scraping — agents may encounter CAPTCHAs
scholarly library periodically breaks when Google changes Scholar HTML
Rate limits are opaque — aggressive use triggers IP blocks without warning
Results are metadata only — no full-text access through this MCP
Not an official Google API — no SLA or stability guarantees
Community MCP server — maintenance depends on individual contributor
agent_readiness.security_notes: Scrapes public Google Scholar — no credentials. No secrets required. Community MCP. Respect Google's ToS — not for commercial scraping. Rate limit conservatively to avoid IP bans.

security_score_components.security_notes: Scrapes public data — no credentials needed. Community MCP. No secrets required. Respect Google ToS. For research use only.
